channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla’s self-driving safeguards fooled by $30 doll heads
item.description: A cottage industry has emerged on Chinese e-commerce platforms selling tiny plastic doll heads designed to trick Tesla’s cabin camera into thinking a driver is paying attention. The devices cost as little as $20 to $50. The products — marketed as “travel companions” and “dashboard decorations” — ...

item.title: Peter Diamandis Dismisses SpaceX Valuation Concerns — 'You're Not Buying Just The Revenue... You're Buying Humanity's Future Economy'
item.description: During an interview with CNBC, Diamandis said that SpaceX is being priced as a normal space company, when it is actually a combination of three converging businesses.

item.title: 2 SpaceX retail investors explain why they bought the IPO & still want more shares
item.description: Two SpaceX (SPCX) retail investors who bought shares at the initial public offering (IPO), Tamar June and Shane Williams, join Yahoo Finance to explain the process, what drew them to the company, and their future plans with the stock.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab snags huge regulatory green light that readies it for public roads
item.description: Tesla Cybercab, the all-electric ride-hailing-geared vehicle void of a steering wheel and pedals, has achieved a significant regulatory milestone. The vehicle has officially secured an EPA Certificate of Conformity for the 2026 Cybercab, classifying it as a battery electric Zero Emission Vehicle ...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab full specs revealed: 3,113 lbs, 219 HP, 48 kWh
item.description: Tesla’s Cybercab EPA certification documents reveal the robotaxi’s full technical specs for the first time — including a 3,113-lb curb weight, a 219 HP motor, and a 48 kWh battery pack. The filing confirms several claims Tesla made about the vehicle while revealing some surprises. The Certificate...

item.title: SpaceX soars with its first launch as a public company, marking a new era
item.description: SpaceX executed its first Falcon 9 launch since going public on June 15, a routine yet symbolically powerful Starlink mission from Vandenberg Space Force Base in California. Liftoff of the Falcon 9 booster B1093, on its 14th flight, occurred at approximately 8:34 a.m. PDT from Space Launch Comple...

item.title: Kalshi Traders See 49% Chance SpaceX and Tesla Will Merge Within a Year
item.description: There are a lot of signs pointing toward a SpaceX-Tesla merger, but also many issues that would need to be ironed out.

item.title: Tesla and SpaceX’s biggest bull just placed a massive $1B bet on the stock
item.description: Renowned investor Ron Baron, founder and CEO of Baron Capital, has once again demonstrated his unwavering faith in Elon Musk’s ventures. Just after SpaceX’s record-breaking IPO, Baron announced he purchased an additional $1 billion in SpaceX ( NASDAQ: SPCX ) shares. This move pushes Baron Capital...

item.title: SpaceX's trading debut puts the market on notice
item.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma discusses Opening Bid's Stock of the Day," SpaceX (SPCX) as the company begins to reshape the space industry. Joined by B. Riley Wealth Chief Market Strategist Art Hogan, Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Ines Ferré, and Markets & Data Editor Jare...

item.title: Elon Musk Praises Tesla's 'Awesome' AI Chip Team, Says AI6 May Set New Wafer Intelligence Record
item.description: Elon Musk said Tesla Inc.'s upcoming AI6 chip could set a record for "usable intelligence" produced from each semiconductor wafer, highlighting the company's effort to pair raw computing power with manufacturing efficiency. Musk Praises Tesla AI Chip Team Musk praised...

item.title: SpaceX maintains bold advertising push for Starlink, contrasting Tesla’s minimalistic approach
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla, the two flagship companies under Elon Musk’s leadership, share a commitment to groundbreaking technology yet pursue dramatically different paths in how they connect with customers. Tesla has built its brand through a philosophy of minimal traditional advertising , trusting that ...

item.title: NIO & TSLA See Fresh Tailwinds But Only One Stock Is Worth Owning
item.description: NIO's rising deliveries, stronger margins and battery-swap expansion make it stand out as Tesla's AI bets face execution risks.

item.title: Tesla Stock Is Getting a U.S.-Iran Deal Bump
item.description: Oil prices are down and stock prices are up after President Trump announced an outline of a deal to end the Iran war.

item.title: Musk Hits $1.05 Trillion As SpaceX Opens 11% Above IPO Price
item.description: SpaceX's $150 debut valued the company near $2 trillion, pushing Musk's fortune to almost $1.05 trillion.

item.title: SpaceX stock gains: What its IPO signals about its future success
item.description: SpaceX stock (SPCX) continues rising in Monday's pre-market trading (maintaining gains at the session open at the time of this video's posting) ahead of the space company's first full day of trading since its historic IPO last Friday. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Barron's Investor Circle Ne...

item.title: Sequoia’s Sean Maguire Compares SpaceX to ‘Nvidia Three Years Ago’ and Plans to Hold Forever
item.description: Sequoia Capital partner Shaun Maguire went on CNBC last week and said SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX), freshly trading, looks to him “more like Nvidia three years ago” than Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA). He also said he plans to hold his shares “forever.” Sequoia is a longtime SpaceX backer, so the incentive to talk ...

item.title: Tesla’s “Misleading” Numbers
item.description: Regulators in Sweden and the Netherlands say Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) has provided them with “misleading data,” according to Reuters. This data involved Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” (FSD) system. The regulators said that Tesla supplied the data.

item.title: Liftoff for 2X Exposure to SpaceX as Direxion Launches LOFF
item.description: 2X Daily Leveraged Exposure to SpaceX – the Largest IPO in History Direxion Liftoff for 2X Exposure to SpaceX as Direxion Launches LOFF New York, New York, June 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of ETFs for tactical traders, today announced the launch of the Direxion Daily...

item.title: SpaceX Stock Starts Week Higher After Friday's Record-Setting IPO
item.description: The big day was Friday—but what happens next? That's on investors' minds during the second-ever trading session for Elon Musk's SpaceX.

item.title: After a Record-Breaking Debut, Is There Still Room to Run in SpaceX?
item.description: The bull case rests less on the rockets that made SpaceX famous and more on the quieter business orbiting overhead.

item.title: Tesla's Optimus Could Drive Huge Revenue Upside, Analyst Says
item.description: Tesla Inc. is well-positioned to scale production of its Optimus humanoid robot by leveraging years of electric vehicle manufacturing experience, artificial intelligence expertise, and an established supplier network, according to a new report. Tesla Leverages EV Expertise for Humanoid Push...

item.title: The 12 Scariest Words in SpaceX's Prospectus All but Confirm an Imminent Fleecing of Retail Investors
item.description: If you thought SpaceX was done raising capital after its $75 billion initial public offering (IPO), guess again!

item.title: From $4 To $500? Eric Jackson's Bold Thesis Pitches Opendoor As Real Estate's Tesla Moment
item.description: EMJ Capital’s Founder Eric Jackson has released a new thesis arguing that real estate platform Opendoor Technologies Inc. isn’t just an iBuyer recovering from macro headwinds—it's an asymmetric bet poised to replicate the “30x to 200x” returns of generational stocks...

item.title: Dan Ives Says He Would Be 'Shocked' If SPCX, TSLA Don't Merge Within A Year – Adds Tesla Shareholders Could Back Deal If Valuation Is Right
item.description: During an interview with CNBC, Ives said Tesla shareholders’ support for a potential merger would largely depend on the valuation and price offered in the deal.

item.title: Tesla Faces Scrutiny Over FSD Safety Claims Submitted to European Regulators
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) provided self-generated safety data to regulators in several European countries as part of its effort to secure approval for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) system, but independent road-safety experts have questioned the validity of the figures, arguing that they may present an ov...

item.title: Tech stocks today: SpaceX becomes more valuable than Tesla
item.description: What to watch from SpaceX and other tech stocks during the holiday-shortened week.

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla Self-Driving Safety Claims Misleading, Says Reuters
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) relied on misleading data when it made representations of enhanced safety through use i

item.title: Exclusive-Tesla presented misleading ‘Full Self-Driving’ safety data to European regulators
item.description: In its efforts to secure European approval of its “Full Self-Driving” (FSD) system, Tesla has presented self-published safety statistics to regulators in Sweden and the Netherlands that independent traffic-safety researchers have said amount to misleading marketing. A Reuters examination publishe...

item.title: Elon Musk just put a $1 Trillion revenue number on SpaceX
item.description: Just days after SpaceX stock pushed its market cap past $2 trillion on its first trading session, closing at $160.95, a 19% gain on the $135 IPO price, Elon Musk posted his own revenue projection on X that went well beyond anything Wall Street modeled. “I think SpaceX might be able to reach appro...

item.title: RIVN Stock Jumps Overnight: CEO Teases Self-Driving System 'Very Similar To Tesla's FSD' This Year
item.description: Scaringe said Rivian is not trying to copy Tesla, saying that "there have been a lot of Model Y copies."

item.title: Tesla Shareholders 'Don't Like Table Scraps' — Bulls Make Case Against SpaceX Merger, See Up To 800% Upside On Robotaxi And Optimus
item.description: Tesla bull Brad Ferguson’s valuation includes $957 from Robotaxi and $2,647 from Optimus.

item.title: Elon Musk Rejects Claims Government Support Built TSLA And SPCX — Says Trump’s EV Credit Cuts Sent More Buyers To Tesla
item.description: Musk said all government incentives received by his companies amount to less than 2% of the combined value of Tesla and SpaceX.

item.title: Elon Musk Says SpaceX Could Put One Million Tons Of Payload In Orbit Within The Next Five Years
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla Inc.CEO Elon Musk predicted that the commercial space flight giant could exceed orbital payload timelines and expectations. One Million Tons In Five Years On Tuesday, influencer Sawyer Merritt took to the social media platform X to outline...

item.title: Longtime SpaceX Investor Cathie Wood Made This Move on IPO Day. Should You Follow?
item.description: The Ark Venture Fund was an early investor in the space giant.

item.title: Cybercab spotted in Mesa, AZ
item.description: First time seeing one in AZ and it just so happened to be in-front of my house. I came outside to go to the grocery store today and watched it roll up, stop briefly, and continue on. Didn’t drop off or pick up anyone.

item.title: Tesla Merger Talk With SpaceX Reshapes AI And Investor Outlook
item.description: Speculation around a potential Tesla and SpaceX merger has intensified following SpaceX's recent IPO and public comments from its president treating the idea as a real possibility. Prediction markets, company filings and several high profile analysts now treat a merger as a credible scenario, rat...

item.title: Elon Musk’s Missed Full Self-Driving Targets Are Even Wilder Than I Remembered
item.description: There’s been a little debate going on lately about whether Tesla Full Self-Driving is “effectively” Level 4 autonomous driving or is still just a Level 2 driver-assist system. Yesterday, I shared a comment from a reader explaining that it’s actually Level 2++ now. I’ll come back to that in a ...

item.title: Survey Sunday: do you still believe in Elon Musk?
item.description: Last week, we ran a sidebar survey asking if Electrek readers still believed in Elon Musk’s vision of a self-driving, robot-built future on Mars. After receiving more than 3,000 responses, here’s what you told us you think about the world’s first trillionaire.

item.title: Will Elon Musk Merge SpaceX And Tesla In 2026? Crypto Prediction Market Isn't Ruling Out The Possibility
item.description: Punters on prediction markets are ramping up bets that Elon Musk may eventually combine Tesla Inc. and SpaceX into one entity. What’s Happening On Polymarket And Kalshi?

item.title: Elon Musk Is A Stone's Throw Away From Becoming The World's First Trillionaire As SpaceX IPO Sends His Net Worth Soaring
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk is on the verge of becoming the world’s first trillionaire as his space venture SpaceX’s blockbuster initial public offering pushed his estimated fortune to within $29 billion of the historic milestone. SpaceX IPO Drives Musk’s...

item.title: Elon Musk's $1 trillion fortune is so vast that Jeff Bezos is now closer in wealth to the average American
item.description: SpaceX founder Elon Musk just became the first person in history to surpass a net worth of $1 trillion, putting him in a wealth category of his own.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: SpaceX rockets past Tesla
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: Piper Sandler Says Tesla Has Cracked Self-Driving Technology Challenge (TSLA)
item.description: Analyst Sees Tesla Reaching Level 4 Autonomy in Most SituationsPiper Sandler analyst Alexander Potter believes Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) has largely achieved Level 4 autonomous driving capability, arguing that the company has overcome the key technological hurdles required for self-driving vehicles des...

item.title: OpenAI Just Launched a Robotics Division. Should Tesla Investors Be Worried?
item.description: ChatGPT's parent isn't an immediate threat. The fact that it's planning on entering the market at all, however, underscores the idea that Tesla isn't going to be in this business all by itself.

item.title: 3 Genius Stocks I'm Buying Instead of the SpaceX IPO
item.description: SpaceX IPO may be popular, but there are better options available.

item.title: This Low-Mileage 2025 Tesla Model Y Lost A Lot Of Range Fast
item.description: After 18 months and just over 13,000 miles, Tesla’s own battery-health test showed a result its owner called unacceptable.

item.title: SpaceX Surge Further Boosts Saudi Billionaire Prince’s Fortune
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Friday’s debut share surge for SpaceX is bolstering the fortunes of one of Saudi Arabia’s richest men. Most Read from BloombergWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOTrump Eyes Sunday Iran Deal But Tehran Says Still Reviewing TextAnthropic Shuts Down Mythos ...

item.title: Can Rivian Beat Tesla in the Long Term?
item.description: Rivian began delivering its affordable R2 fleet this week in a push to bring the company to the mainstream.

item.title: Elon Musk Is Now the World's First Trillionaire. For Tesla Shareholders, the More Important Question Is What Comes Next.
item.description: A second Musk-led megacap is now publicly traded -- and that quietly changes a few things for the electric-car maker's investors.

item.title: Observations After Two Weeks with Tesla Hardware 4 & Full Self Driving V14 in My 2026 Tesla Model Y
item.description: I lived through almost 7 years of numerous releases of Tesla’s Full Self Driving (FSD) as it progressed in my 2019 Model 3 using “Hardware 3” (HW3), finally reaching FSD V12. Elon Musk promised every year that all of us Tesla owners with HW3 would see Level 4 self-driving in ... [continued] The...
